name: Dr. Arjun Mehta
bio: Dr. Arjun Mehta heads the Medical Vision Lab where he develops deep learning models for automated diagnosis from radiology scans. His seminal work on attention-based segmentation of brain MRI lesions is deployed in five teaching hospitals across India. He has created a benchmark dataset of 200,000 annotated chest X-rays for multi-disease classification and pioneered few-shot domain adaptation techniques that allow models trained on one imaging modality to transfer to another with minimal labeled examples. His lab collaborates closely with AIIMS Delhi and Narayana Health.
